name: szumrak
description: Autonomous agent for performing narrow, highly verifiable tasks on target repositories.

scripts.dev:build: npm run build && docker build -t szumrak -f docker/Dockerfile .
scripts.dev:run: docker run --rm -e ANTHROPIC_API_KEY -e GH_TOKEN -e TASK -e REPO -e DRY_RUN=true -v $TARGET_REPO_PATH:/workspace szumrak
